top_candidates.reasoning: The 'competent peers update their model' framing — explicitly invoking mahā-rathas as the specific witness-class, the peer-default-defaulting-to-fear, and the bahu-mataḥ-to-lāghavam phase change — is the structural signature of bhayād raṇād uparataṁ maṁsyante tvāṁ mahā-rathāḥ. The Kubernetes-operator scenario specifically requires the competent-peer-network frame to land.
Adjacent verse — also reputation. But 2.34 names imperishable disrepute among bhūtāni (all beings); 2.35 sharpens to mahā-rathas (competent peers). Different scoping.
Continues the akīrti chain (vācyāḥ avācya-vādān). But 2.36 names the speech itself (unspeakable insults), not the model-update. Different doctrinal move.
